holdings.infoBox: ABLG is an equity ETF with a total of 55 individual holdings. The top holdings are Advantest stock at 5.82%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 4.86%, Novartis AG at 3.48%, Roche Holding AG at 3.42%, and LVMH Moet Hennessy Louis Vuitton SE at 3.30%.

overview.description: The Abacus FCF International Leaders ETF (ABLG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund aims to outperform a broad global ex-US equity index. The actively managed fund selects stocks based on free cash flow. ABLG was launched on Jun 27, 2017 and is issued by Abacus.
